meaning: 娴峰痉灏斿牎[寰锋剰蹇楄仈閭﹀叡鍜屽浗瑗垮崡閮ㄥ煄甯俔
examples: Many of our teachers also have valuable academic links with Heidelberg University.
The neuroscientist Peter Schneider from Heidelberg University in Germany, for example, has been following a group of children for ten years now.
The Heidelberg Painter is the first Attic painter to show him with the Erymanthian boar.
Like the city itself, Guyton's masterpiece, the Heidelberg Project, has seen its share of adversity.
After some lab work, the DNA was dispatched to an EMBL lab in Heidelberg, Germany.
